changes: Initial release
Implemented player movement and jumping
Added map editor functionality
Support for level import/export
Added start, end, trap and other items
Implemented level selection interface
Added multi-language support (Simplified Chinese/English)
Added settings interface with language switching
Added developer info button
Added door item with click toggle
Fixed door state initialization issue
Fixed editor item overlap placement issue
Added changelog feature
Fixed text overflow clipping in changelog
Added scroll range limits
Version number now auto-syncs from main.py
Added English changelog (changelog-en.json)
Language-based changelog display (Chinese shows changelog.json, others show changelog-en.json)
Fixed black box display issue in changelog (using SRCALPHA transparent Surface)
Fixed incomplete content display in changelog
Optimized scroll clipping logic using set_clip for precise clipping
Added maximum scroll range limit to prevent over-scrolling
Fixed issue where changelog showed old language content after switching languages
Fixed changelog display issue, ensuring complete content display
Changelog now reloads corresponding language file when entering the interface
Added Level 3: Mechanism Chamber (advanced level with door mechanisms)
Updated version to v1.0.5
